generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin system for 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle in ACC domain"
    base:contains LowerChassis, UpperChassis, AutonomyElements
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin system deployed on cloud or edge server hardware"
    base:contains DataPreProcessingFE, PointCloudClusteringTracking, DataTranslationFE, ReportingFE, DataStorageComponent
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User interface environment for operators and developers"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance LowerChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower chassis layer of the physical vehicle"
]

instance UpperChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper chassis layer of the physical vehicle"
]

instance AutonomyElements : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Autonomy elements including resource-constrained ECUs and sensors"
]

instance DataStorageComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data storage component for persistent storage of twin data"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualization
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel for remote management commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisable, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor state sensor monitoring motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStateDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo position sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor capturing speed, position, and other operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance MotorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor
]

instance SteeringServoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance MotorStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor operational state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance SteeringServoData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering servo position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed, position, and state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "2D plane object tracks derived from LiDAR point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering and tracking software component for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data preprocessing component handling initial sensor data processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MotorStateData, SteeringServoData, VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Translation component for serialization, message alignment, and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateData, ObjectTracksData, ProjectedDrivingPathData
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reporting component for generating data reports and logs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateData, ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path with capabilities to view, save, and generate reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computations to cloud resources including lead vehicle detection, desired speed calculation, and actuation commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, DesiredSpeedCalculation, ActuationCommandGeneration
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control service enabling operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands; developers utilize data collection for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisable, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand, DataCollectionForTroubleshooting
]

instance DataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save and generate reports from monitoring data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles for ACC system"
]

instance DesiredSpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of actuation commands for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable ACC functionality remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command to vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataCollectionForTroubleshooting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data collection for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system enforces 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy across all devices for computation offloading, complying with safety-critical vehicular standards that typically require stricter synchronization (<100 ms), with this requirement dictated by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, organizing software components into three entities (Physical Twin Entity hosting resource-specific and general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, Digital Twin Entity for data management and control, User Entity for user-facing components) each deployed on dedicated hardware. ROS2 packages implement each FE as nodes, with deviations in the Physical Twin Entity's scope impacting functionality ownership and engineering processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs via ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard (Part 2: Reference Architecture), defining entities including Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) implement tasks using OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection, device control, and interoperability."
]
